response: Acme Corp reported strong financial performance this year, with total revenue of **$54.4 million** across four quarters, peaking at **$16.2 million in Q4**. The company saw a notable **18% year-over-year growth**, though revenue dipped slightly in Q3 to **$11.8 million** after rising steadily from **$12.3 million in Q1** to **$14.1 million in Q2**. Headquartered in **Austin, Texas**, Acme employs **342 people** across its operations.
